name: Humax Holdings
message: We hacked Humax Holdings. https://holdings.humaxdigital.com/  Founded in 1989 as Humax Co., Ltd., the company changed its name to its current name in 2009 when it transitioned to a non-financial holding company.  Its subsidiaries include Humax Co., Ltd., a global manufacturer of broadcasting/telecommunications gateways; Alticast Co., Ltd., a digital broadcasting software specialist; and Humax Mobility Co., Ltd., a total mobility solutions provider.  We have at our disposal fiscal data, internal mail, data of all employees of the company, as well as strategic development plans.
